scan_metadata.agent_version: static-pass-ab/0.1.0 (manual — Nanoclaw unavailable in CI sandbox)

findings.evidence:
response = client.chat.completions.create(
        model=settings.openai_model,
        messages=messages,
        temperature=0.3,
        response_format={"type": "json_object"},
    )
findings.notes: Primary LLM call site; model resolved from settings.openai_model

findings.evidence:
from openai import OpenAI
...

findings.notes: Default model is static; runtime may override via env OPENAI_MODEL
Dependency declaration; actual usage in agent.py

findings.evidence:

...

coverage_notes: Whole repo scanned excluding node_modules, backend/venv, .git
backend/app/search.py uses Brave Search API (api.search.brave.com) — not an LLM provider; excluded from LLM findings
frontend/src/ has no direct LLM SDK usage; calls backend /api/ask only
backend/.env not readable (mount security); OPENAI_API_KEY inferred from code references only
Static manual pass — re-run via Nanoclaw for agent-validated output
